    Frequently Asked & Questions

    We handle a range of cargo, including general goods, perishables,
    hazardous
    materials, oversized cargo, and more. Please contact us for specific
    requirements.
    Email Us - infoonetrack@gmail.com

    Shipping time depends on the destination, shipping method (air, sea, or
    land),
    and customs procedures. On average:

    • Air Freight: 3-10 days
    • Ocean Freight: 20-45 days
    • For an exact estimate, please contact our support team. Email Us - infoonetrack@gmail.com
    • FCL (Full Container Load): A single shipper uses the entire
      container, ideal for large shipments.
    • LCL (Less than Container Load): Multiple shippers share
      space in one container, cost-effective for smaller shipments.
    • Email Us - infoonetrack@gmail.com

    Commonly required documents include:

    • Bill of Lading / Air Waybill
    • Commercial Invoice
    • Packing List
    • Certificate of Origin
    • Customs Declaration
    • Email Us - infoonetrack@gmail.com

    Customs clearance is the process of verifying and approving cargo for entry or
    exit in a country. It involves:

    • Submitting shipping documents
    • Paying duties/taxes
    • Inspection (if required)
    • Email Us - infoonetrack@gmail.com

    Simply visit your device’s app store (Google Play or Apple App Store), search for our app, and tap Update. Make sure you have a stable internet connection for a smooth update.
